id.description: The unique ID of the category

parent_id.description: Optional parent category ID to support nested hierarchy

community_link.description: Optional social media or chat community group link

Document.title: Document
Document.description: An educational resource or document shared in the vault

id.description: The unique ID of the document

description.description: A summary or description of the document contents

file_url.description: Target download page or file storage URL (e.g., Google Drive)

category_id.description: Category ID the document belongs to

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when the document was published

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Store all document and exam categories in a flat or child list

/documents/{documentId}.description: Store all curriculum notes, exam prep, codings, physical sheets, and English materials
